hero.headline:
38 Years of Backyard Bliss Starts
Right Here
hero.subheadline: From hot tubs and pools to billiards and saunas, Elko Spas has been the Grand Strand's trusted destination since 1987. Visit our Myrtle Beach showroom and let our award-winning team help you create the backyard retreat you deserve.

services.label: What We Offer
services.headline: Premium Products for Your<br class="hidden md:block"> Home & Backyard
services.subtitle: From relaxation to recreation, Elko Spas carries only the highest quality brands. Whether you want a hot tub for unwinding, a pool for the family, or a game room for entertaining, we have you covered.

cards.title: Hot Tubs & Spas
cards.description: Authorized Hot Spring Spas dealer with a full lineup of premium hot tubs. Expert consultation, local delivery, professional installation, and ongoing maintenance all under one roof.

cards.title: Swimming Pools
cards.description: Inground and above ground pools from Alaglas, Imagine Pools, Doughboy, and Embassy. Full design, installation, and service to bring your dream pool to life.

cards.title: Swim Spas
cards.description: PDC Swim Spas for year-round fitness and relaxation. Combines the benefits of a full pool and hot tub in one compact, versatile unit with professional installation.

cards.title: Billiards & Game Rooms
cards.description: Premium Olhausen billiard tables and game room equipment. Expert delivery and setup to create the perfect entertainment space in your home.

cards.title: Saunas & Cold Plunge
cards.description: TYLO saunas and Vigor Cold Plunge systems for complete home wellness. Professional installation and expert guidance on usage and maintenance included.

cards.title: Water Care & Service
cards.description: E-Z CLOR water care products and professional water testing to keep your hot tub or pool clean, balanced, and safe. Plus full service and repair by factory-trained techs.

how_it_works.headline: Your Perfect Backyard in Three Steps

steps.title: Visit Our Showroom
steps.description: Browse our fully-loaded Myrtle Beach showroom at your own pace. Our knowledgeable staff is here to answer questions with zero pressure to buy.

steps.title: Get Expert Guidance
steps.description: We help you choose the right product for your space, lifestyle, and budget. With 38 years of experience, we match you with exactly what you need.

steps.title: Relax & Enjoy
steps.description: We handle delivery, installation, and setup. Then our service team is always here when you need maintenance, water care, or repairs down the road.

about.label: Why Grand Strand Families Choose Us
about.headline: Family-Owned, Award-Winning, and Built on Trust
about.description: Founded by Michael and Kimberly Elko in 1987, Elko Spas has grown into the Grand Strand's most trusted name in hot tubs, pools, and recreation. Our philosophy is simple: carry only the highest quality products priced fairly, provide a comfortable shopping environment, and educate our customers on every product we sell. As multiple-time National Hot Spring Dealer of the Year winners, we back every product with premium warranties and the kind of personal service only a family business can deliver.

features.title: National Award-Winning Dealer
features.description: Multiple-time Hot Spring Dealer of the Year for Retail Excellence and 2024 AQUA 100 honoree among the nation's top pool and spa retailers.

features.title: No-Pressure Showroom
features.description: Our fully-loaded Myrtle Beach showroom lets you explore at your own pace. We educate, we answer questions, and we never push you to buy.

features.title: Full-Service from Start to Finish
features.description: Sales, delivery, installation, water care, and ongoing service all handled in-house by our trained team. One call does it all.

pricing.headline: Premium Products, Fair Pricing.
pricing.subtitle: We carry only the best brands and price them honestly. Visit our showroom for a personalized quote tailored to your space and budget.

guarantee.headline: Our "Relax With Confidence" Guarantee
guarantee.description: Every product we sell is backed by some of the best warranties in the industry. If anything needs attention after installation, our factory-trained service team is just a phone call away. We stand behind every hot tub, pool, and game table we deliver because your satisfaction is our reputation.

faqs.question: What brands of hot tubs do you carry?
faqs.answer: We are an authorized Hot Spring Spas dealer, carrying their full lineup of premium hot tubs. As multiple-time National Dealer of the Year winners, we offer models at every price point with industry-leading warranties. Visit our showroom to try them out.

faqs.question: Do you handle delivery and installation?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Our trained crew handles everything from delivery to professional installation. Whether it's a hot tub, pool, swim spa, or billiard table, we make sure it's set up perfectly so you can start enjoying it right away.

faqs.question: Can I visit your showroom without an appointment?
faqs.answer: Yes! Our Myrtle Beach showroom is open for walk-ins during regular business hours. Our staff is here to answer questions and help you explore options at your own pace with absolutely no pressure to buy.

faqs.question: Do you service and repair hot tubs and pools?
faqs.answer: We do. Our factory-trained technicians provide comprehensive service and repairs for spas, pools, and game room equipment. We also offer professional water testing and a full line of E-Z CLOR water care products.

faqs.question: What areas do you serve?
faqs.answer: We serve the entire Grand Strand region including Myrtle Beach, Horry County, and surrounding areas throughout coastal South Carolina. Contact us to confirm service availability for your specific location.

testimonials.name: Anne K.
testimonials.text: I have owned spas before but the salt spa I bought from Elko is by far the best experience. The team was knowledgeable and made the entire process seamless.

testimonials.name: Heather H.
testimonials.text: Just wanted to let you know how pleased we are with our pool that was installed by Elko. The entire process from sales to installation was professional and smooth.

testimonials.name: Gary B.
testimonials.text: ELKO Spas did a magnificent job servicing and providing great peace of mind. Excellent service and workmanship from start to finish.

contact.headline:
Ready to Create Your
Perfect Backyard?
contact.subtitle: Stop by our Myrtle Beach showroom or call for a free consultation. No pressure, no obligations — just honest advice from a family team that's been doing this for 38 years.

footer.description: Award-winning family-owned dealer. Serving the Grand Strand since 1987.
